mapper.sql: id, build_config_code, family_code, feature_code, feature_type, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_veh_build_config_feature_code ( id, build_config_code, family_code, feature_code, feature_type, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{buildConfigCode}, #{familyCode}, #{featureCode}, #{featureType}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO tb_veh_build_config_feature_code ( id, build_config_code, family_code, feature_code, feature_type, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.buildConfigCode}, #{item.familyCode}, #{item.featureCode}, #{item.featureType}, #{item.description}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_veh_build_config_feature_code t SET
t.build_config_code = #{buildConfigCode},
t.family_code = #{familyCode},
t.feature_code = #{featureCode},
t.feature_type = #{featureType},
t.description = #{description},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_veh_build_config_feature_code t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_veh_build_config_feature_code t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_veh_build_config_feature_code t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_veh_build_config_feature_code t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
